support_button.title: Back the Project
support_button.description: Flux Tweaks is free, forever — built out of passion for Android performance. If it’s made your device faster, consider supporting the work.

learn_flux.title: Explore Flux
learn_flux.description: Deep-dive into profiles, tuning, and everything Flux Tweaks can do for your device.

lite_mode.title: Enforce Lite Mode
lite_mode.description: Cap performance headroom for all games by default, saving battery without sacrificing smoothness

device_mitigation.title: Device Mitigation
device_mitigation.description: Apply device-specific workarounds to keep Flux stable on your hardware

cpu_governor.title: CPU Governor
cpu_governor.description: Fine-tune which CPU governor Flux uses for each performance profile

log_level.title: Log Level
log_level.description: Control how verbose the Flux operational log is

save_log.title: Save Log
save_log.description: Export the full Flux diagnostic log for debugging or reporting

create_shortcut.title: Create Shortcut
create_shortcut.description: Pin Flux Tweaks to your home screen for instant access

disable_tweaks.title: Disable Tweaks
disable_tweaks.description: Suspend all Flux performance tweaks — useful if you only need the add-on framework

about.description: Flux Tweaks is a high-performance Magisk module engineered by FebriCahyaa, targeting Snapdragon SoCs with intelligent profiling, thermal awareness, and game-level CPU/GPU tuning. Built on a C++ daemon, Kotlin/Compose companion app, and a Vue 3 WebUI.

game_settings.title: Game Settings
game_settings.lite_mode_description: Optimize for longer battery life over peak performance
game_settings.dnd_mode_description: Block notifications and calls while gaming

lite_mode.title: Lite Mode
lite_mode.brief: Lite mode reduces overheating and power consumption during gameplay by lowering CPU and component frequencies. This setting applies to all games when enabled.

disable_tweaks.title: Disable Tweaks
disable_tweaks.brief: When enabled, this setting turns off all built-in performance optimizations on Flux Tweaks, allowing you to use this module strictly as a host for Flux Addon modules.

device_mitigation.title: Device Mitigation
device_mitigation.brief: Device mitigation disables potentially incompatible tweaks for specific devices. Keep it disabled unless you have problems.

cpu_governor.title: CPU Governor
cpu_governor.default_description: Applied to balanced and performance profiles when lite mode is active
cpu_governor.powersave_description: Exclusively used for the powersave profile
cpu_governor.brief: CPU governor is an algorithm that dynamically adjusts the processor's frequency in real time, directly affecting system performance and power consumption.

modal.performance_warning: Setting the governor to "performance" will cause overheating and rapid battery drain. Are you sure you want to proceed?
modal.initial_warn: Please note that Flux Tweaks has automatically configured the optimal CPU Governor. Manual changes are not recommended unless you are an advanced user.

reboot_modal.title: Reboot Required
reboot_modal.description: This change requires a reboot to take effect. Would you like to reboot now?

toast.reboot_to_apply: Reboot your device to apply changes.
toast.shortcut_unavailable: No API available for this feature, use WebUI X to use this feature.

monitor_page.title: Live Monitor
monitor_page.thermal_unsupported: Thermal headroom API not available on this device (requires API 31+)

thermal_hint.hot: Thermal pressure high — Performance Lite engaged
thermal_hint.warm: Entering hysteresis zone — throttling may begin
thermal_hint.cool: All systems nominal — full performance unlocked

monitor_page.thermal_gki_note: GKI kernels may not expose thermal headroom API
